text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for summer camp, and tons of fans have
surrounded the bus that will take us there, but
Kitasan Black isn't letting it go to her head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being voted as the most popular Umamusume is
proof that people have high expectations of her.
She swears to live up to them this summer.
